name: Toile Stitch Lamp Shade Shell - Threshold™: Linen Drum Slip Uno Fitter for Small Lamp Bases
description:
Changing up the look of a room is as easy as adding the Toile-Stitch Lamp Shade Shell from Threshold™. This drum lamp shade features a neutral-colored linen construction with contrasting black floral stitching, creating a dynamic look for your favorite spaces. Add this neutral lampshade to your entryway lamp or reading lamp for a dose of unique and personalized style.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
